title: Clubul Computer
text:
Clubul Computer
    A community-driven tech club. Learn, build, and share — all ages, all levels.
  



  
    What we do
    Six programs for every interest and skill level.
    
      WorkshopsPython, web dev, JavaScript — beginner to advanced.Schedule
      Tech TalksIndustry speakers on open source, AI ethics, cybersecurity.Browse talks
      Junior ClubGame dev, robot programming, and digital storytelling for ages 8-14.Learn more
      Hardware HackingArduino, Raspberry Pi, IoT devices, and 3D printing.See projects
      Open SourceFind projects, understand codebases, make real contributions.Join session
      Project IncubatorTurn your idea into reality with mentorship and resources.Submit idea
    
  



  
    
      
      
        Technology foreveryone.
        No fees. No requirements. Just show up. Whether you're 8 or 80, a complete beginner or a senior developer — Clubul Computer is your space to learn, experiment, and connect with people who share your curiosity.
        Visit clubul.computer
      
    
  



  
    
      
      
        Real projects.Real impact.
        Our members build educational tools used in 150+ Romanian schools, deploy air quality sensors across cities, and contribute to open-source projects used worldwide. This isn't a classroom — it's a launchpad.
        See community projects
      
    
  



  
    
      150+Schools reached
      5000+Students
      25IoT sensors deployed
      0Membership fee
    
  



  
    Find us
    
    
      Main location: Craiova, Romania
      Satellite meetups: Bucharest (quarterly) + Online
      Email: social@clubul.computer
      When: Last Thursday of every month
    
  



  
    
    Join the club
    Show up to a meetup or reach out online. That's it.
    
      Visit clubul.computer
      Book a call

title: Digital Resilience
text:
Digital Resilience
    Adaptive frameworks that ensure operational continuity when it matters most.
  



  
    Resilience, simplified
    Four pillars working together to keep your business running.
    
      Business ContinuityMaintain essential functions during and after disruptions.
      Disaster RecoveryRapid restoration with minimal downtime and data loss.
      Architecture ReviewDefense-in-depth design with zero-trust principles.
      Risk AssessmentIdentify gaps and build a prioritized improvement roadmap.
    
  



  
    
      
      
        Built to endure.Designed to recover.
        We help you plan for the worst and build for the best. From business impact analysis through tabletop exercises, every critical function gets a recovery strategy with clear RTOs and RPOs — aligned to ISO 22301 and NIST frameworks.
        Assess your resilience
      
    
  



  
    
    Start buildingresilience today
    30 minutes. No pitch. Just an honest look at your continuity readiness.
    Book a consultation
    
       Free  
       30 min  
       Gap report in 5 days

title: Resources
text:
Resource Library
Welcome to our resource library. Here you’ll find a variety of tools, guides, presentations, and reference materials to help you implement our solutions effectively and enhance your technical knowledge.

title: Social Responsibility
text:
Social Responsibility
    Using technology as a force for good in the communities we serve.
  



  
    Three pillars of impact
    Our CSR approach focuses on sustainability, inclusion, and leveraging tech for social good.
    
      Environmental SustainabilityCarbon-neutral cloud operations, green office initiatives, sustainable IT disposal, and remote work policies to reduce emissions.
      Digital InclusionTechnology education for underserved communities, accessible web design training, computer donations, and scholarships.
      Tech for GoodPro bono consulting for nonprofits, open-source social impact projects, disaster response tech, and environmental monitoring.
    
  



  
    Digital Literacy Initiative
    Bridging the digital divide in underserved communities since 2023.
    
      50+Workshops conducted
      500+Participants trained
      5Computer labs built
      1,200+Volunteer hours
    
  



  
    GreenTech Initiative
    Reducing the environmental impact of technology and promoting sustainable IT practices.
    
      150tCarbon offset
      2.5tE-waste recycled
      30%Energy reduction
      15+Sustainable partners
    
  



  
    Nonprofit Tech Support
    Empowering nonprofits through pro bono technology consulting and services.
    
      12 OrganizationsSupported with custom technology solutions and consulting.
      1,000+ HoursDonated in pro bono technical consulting services.
      8 SolutionsCustom software for healthcare, education, and conservation.
      24 SessionsCybersecurity training programs delivered to nonprofit staff.
    
  



  
    Employee volunteering
    Every team member actively participates in our social initiatives.
    
      85%Employee participation
      2,500+Volunteer hours
      20+Community partners
      15Employee-led initiatives
    
  



  
    Looking ahead
    Ambitious goals for measurable impact.
    
      Carbon NeutralMaintain carbon-neutral operations and help clients reduce their footprint.
      5,000 ReachedExpand digital literacy programs to reach 5,000 individuals by 2027.
      EUR 500KProvide in pro bono services to nonprofits by 2027.
      90% ParticipationEmployee volunteering target across the organization.
    
  



  
    
    Partner with usfor good
    Whether you're a nonprofit, school, or business committed to sustainability, we'd love to collaborate.
    Get in touch

title: Community
text:
Our Community
    Building stronger tech communities through sharing, contribution, and mentorship.
  



  
    Open source
    Projects we've built and maintain for the community.
    
      SecurityScanAutomated security scanning for web apps. 150K+ downloads, 500+ GitHub stars.View on GitHub
      CloudCostMonitorCloud spending optimization across providers. Used by 200+ organizations.View on GitHub
      DevSecurity GuideComprehensive secure development guide. Translated into 5 languages.View on GitHub
      Core ContributionsSecurity patches, performance fixes, and docs for popular open-source projects.Our GitHub profile
    
  



  
    Events and meetups
    Knowledge sharing and community building, in person and online.
    
      SecureDev ConferenceAnnual event with 500+ attendees from 20+ countries, 30+ expert speakers, workshops, and hands-on labs. Scholarship program for underrepresented groups.
      Cloud Optimization MeetupMonthly hybrid gathering of cloud practitioners sharing real-world strategies for performance, cost, and security optimization.
      Code and CoffeeWeekly informal coding sessions open to all skill levels. Expert mentors available for guidance and collaborative problem-solving.
    
  



  
    Education
    Nurturing the next generation of technology professionals.
    
      CodeStart BootcampFree 8-week coding bootcamp for underrepresented groups. 150+ graduates, 85% job placement within 6 months.
      Computer ClubYear-round programming and robotics club for ages 8-18 in Bucharest, Cluj-Napoca, and Timisoara.
      Educator ResourcesFree, open-source teaching materials for K-12 and university computer science education.
      University PartnershipsGuest lectures, curriculum development, internships, and research collaborations with top institutions.
    
  



  
    Mentorship
    Accelerating growth through structured guidance and support.
    
      Tech Mentorship ProgramSix-month cycles connecting experienced professionals with early-career technologists. Personalized development plans, regular check-ins, and progress tracking across technical skills, career development, and leadership.
      Startup Guidance ProgramQuarterly cohorts of technical mentorship for founders. Architecture reviews, technology stack consultations, security planning, and technical due diligence preparation with monthly one-on-one sessions.
    
  



  
    Industry partners
    Collaborating to strengthen the technology ecosystem.
    
      Tech Association of RomaniaIndustry advocacy and standards development.
      Digital Skills CoalitionDigital literacy and workforce development.
      Cybersecurity AllianceSecurity awareness and education.
      Cloud Native FoundationOpen-source cloud technologies.
    
  



  
    
    Get involved
    Attend an event, contribute to a project, or become a mentor. There's a place for you.
    Join our community
    
       Events  
       Open source  
       Mentorship

title: Digital Infrastructure
text:
Digital Infrastructure
    Open-source, UNIX, and Apple platforms. Deployed and managed for your business.
  



  
    Three pillars. One partner.
    Everything your business needs to run, secured and maintained by us.
    
      Open-Source StackProductivity, communication, identity, and monitoring — no license fees.
      UNIX SystemsLinux and BSD servers, firewalls, storage, and declarative infrastructure.
      Apple InfrastructureApple Business MDM, zero-touch deployment, email, and brand management.
    
  



  
    
      
      
        Replace licenses.Keep the functionality.
        Nextcloud for files. Collabora for documents. Matrix for chat. Keycloak for SSO. Prometheus for monitoring. All open-source, all self-hosted, all yours.
        Plan your stack
      
    
  



  
    
      
      
        Servers that runthemselves.
        NixOS for declarative, reproducible deployments. OpenBSD for firewalls. FreeBSD for ZFS storage. Debian for everything else. Hardened by default.
        Design your infrastructure
      
    
  



  
    
      
      
        Apple Business.Free. Built-in. Ready.
        The new unified platform launches April 14, 2026. Free MDM, Blueprints for zero-touch setup, business email on your domain, and brand management across Maps, Wallet, and Mail.
        Set up Apple Business
      
    
  



  
    
      40–70%IT cost savings
      100%Open-source
      EUData sovereignty
      24/7Monitoring
    
  



  
    Pick your starting point
    All packages include deployment, hardening, monitoring, and support.
    
      
        
          Starter
          1–10 employees
          
            Apple Business setup
            1 Linux server
            Nextcloud + email
            Basic firewall
            Automated backups
            Uptime monitoring
          
          Get a quote
        
      
      
        
          Most popular

            Everything in Starter
            Full Apple MDM
            OpenBSD firewall + VPN
            Keycloak SSO

          Book consultation

            Multi-site VPN mesh
            NIS2 + GDPR baselines
            24/7 incident response
          
          Contact us
